title: Goosey, goosey, gander,
content:
Goosey, goosey, gander,
        Whither will you wander?
    Upstairs and downstairs,
        And in my lady's chamber!
meaning:
Helen Beatrix Potter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Goosey, goosey, gander,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
